query: Please refund the difference to my original payment method, and yes, please go ahead and make the change to my order. Thank you!

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to change wireless earbuds in pending order W5061109 to a blue variant and asks to keep the replacement at the same price or lower.
assistant: The assistant authenticates the account using name and zip code, retrieves the order, and inspects Wireless Earbuds product variants.
assistant: The assistant identifies a blue earbuds variant with 8-hour battery life and no water resistance at $242.92 versus the original $256.67, explains that the change is possible, and notes the price difference can be refunded.
user: The user confirms the chosen blue earbuds variant and asks for the refund difference to go back to the original payment method.

candidate_answers.text: Understood. I have the selected replacement and refund destination, so I can update the order now.
The user has already approved the exact lower-priced replacement and refund handling, making pending-order item modification the grounded next move.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a state where the assistant has already narrowed the request to a specific cheaper earbuds variant and the user authorizes the swap plus refund handling.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from visible context. modify_pending_order_items is highest because the replacement choice and payment-difference handling are already explicit.
notes: query comes directly from the selected visible user message, not from hidden task text
history_summary stops at the decision point and excludes future assistant or tool outputs
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
This sample broadens retail coverage with a pending-item modification that refunds the price difference to the original payment method instead of a gift card.
